Complete the following user request:

<request added="original (start of loop1)" from="user" commit="d0bc53a" time="2026-05-05 16:08 EDT">

Task: focus on `32×32 -> 128×128` spatial case with CRPS as metric. ≤2 hr of training allowed. Do the best you can.
test dataset/task: `32×32 -> 128×128` exactly as in "constrained-downscaling"
Use CRPS as eval metric; you may use any loss function for training. Finetuning pretrained weights (from prior iterations, foundation models, pretrained backbon... [truncated, 3362 chars total]

DiT flow matching: CRPS=0.243 (10K test, corrected Gneiting). Negative result — 22% worse than UNet (0.199). Also verified CRPS formula discrepancy between branches. Model weights saved to pool. Next: try smaller patch size, more epochs, or different architecture direction.

UNet CFG flow matching: CRPS=0.196 (10K test, Gneiting M^2). 19% better than DiT (0.243). CFG guidance negative result — standard conditional (g=1.0) is optimal, guidance hurts CRPS. Model weights in pool. Next: try more epochs, different architectures, or loss functions.
